name: JalMitra
description: JalMitra — Citizen/Policymaker Chatbot for Drinking Water Analytics (Watson Assistant Lite)

intents.description: User asks about drinking water access percentage in a state/region

examples.text: What percent of rural Bihar has improved water access?
Water access in Rajasthan
How many households in Uttar Pradesh have safe water?
Tell me the drinking water coverage in rural Odisha
What is improved water source percentage in Maharashtra?
Piped water coverage in Kerala
Water access statistics for Jharkhand
Percentage of population with clean water in Chhattisgarh
How is Assam doing on drinking water?
Show me water access data for West Bengal

intents.description: User asks about rural-urban gap in water access

examples.text: What is the rural urban gap in water access in Gujarat?
How big is the disparity between villages and cities in Rajasthan?
Equity gap for drinking water in Bihar
Which states have highest rural urban water gap?
Urban vs rural water difference in Madhya Pradesh
Disparity in water access between sectors
How unequal is water access in Uttar Pradesh?
Compare rural and urban water coverage in Karnataka

intents.description: User asks which states need urgent water access intervention

examples.text: Which states need urgent water intervention?
List the worst performing states for water access
Which states are at risk of missing SDG 6?
Show priority states for water investment
Where should government focus water programs?
States that need immediate water infrastructure
Bottom 10 states for drinking water
Worst states for rural water access in India
Which districts need most help with water?
Critical intervention states for Jal Jeevan Mission

intents.description: User asks about SDG 6 progress or target compliance

examples.text: Is Punjab on track for SDG 6?
SDG 6.1 progress in India
Will Bihar meet the 2030 water target?
How is India doing on Sustainable Development Goal 6?
Which states will miss SDG 6 targets?
SDG 6 compliance for Telangana
Track record for clean water goals
Progress toward safe drinking water target

intents.description: User asks about correlation between clean cooking fuel and water access

examples.text: Is clean cooking fuel linked to water access?
Relationship between LPG usage and drinking water in rural areas
Do states with better cooking fuel have better water access?
Clean cooking fuel and water access correlation
Which states have both low water and low cooking fuel access?

intents.description: User asks about migration trends and their effect on water access

examples.text: How does migration affect water access?
States with high migration and poor water coverage
Migration rate and water access in Bihar
Do people migrate because of poor water access?
Hello
Hi JalMitra
Good morning
Namaste
Start
Bye
Thank you
That's all
Exit

entities.description: Indian state or union territory name

values.text:
🌊 Namaste! I'm **JalMitra**, your AI guide for drinking water data in India.

I can help you with:
• Water access statistics by state
• Rural-urban equity gaps
• SDG 6 progress tracking
• Priority states for intervention

Try asking: *"What is the rural water access in Bihar?"* or *"Which states need urgent intervention?"*
Namaste! I'm JalMitra. Ask me about water access data for any Indian state. How can I help?
Thank you for using JalMitra! Together, let's ensure safe water for every Indian household. 🌊
I didn't quite understand that. I can help with water access statistics, equity gaps, SDG 6 progress, and priority states. Try asking about a specific state like *"Water access in Rajasthan"*.
